test_cases:
[
  {
    "testCaseID": "TC_POS_001",
    "title": "Validate successful LTE Attach and Detach with single UE under excellent radio conditions",
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "Single cell test setup with only one active UE placed under excellent radio conditions (LTE RSRP as per Clause 4.6).",
      "All other cells powered off.",
      "End-to-end LTE setup operational with no connectivity issues."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G CLI interface using `SSH admin@<IP>` and authenticate with appropriate credentials.",
      "Configure the test setup as per test configuration and record parameters.",
      "Start logging to capture call flow and signaling messages.",
      "Power ON the UE to initiate LTE attach procedure.",
      "Wait for successful attach confirmation in logs (attach request and attach complete messages).",
      "Verify UE is attached to the correct LTE cell by checking PCI, Global eNB ID, and ARFCN as per test configuration.",
      "Power OFF the UE to initiate LTE detach procedure.",
      "Wait for successful detach confirmation in logs (detach request and detach accept messages).",
      "Stop and save logs for analysis.",
      "Repeat steps 4 to 9 for a total of 10 iterations."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "Attach success rate is 100%, with all 10 iterations completing attach procedure successfully.",
      "Detach success rate is 100%, with all 10 iterations completing detach procedure successfully.",
      "Attach latency is measured and recorded (minimum, average, maximum) as per Table 5-3.",
      "UE is attached to correct cell parameters in all iterations.",
      "No connectivity issues or failures during attach-detach procedures."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "Test logs stored for reference.",
      "KPI measurements recorded in test report."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Log analysis of attach and detach signaling messages",
      "Verification of UE cell parameters in logs",
      "KPI calculation for attach success rate, detach success rate, and latency"
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "TC_POS_002",
    "title": "Validate successful 5G NSA Attach and Detach with single UE under excellent radio conditions",
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "Single cell test setup with only one active UE placed under excellent radio conditions (5G SS-RSRP as per Clause 4.6).",
      "All other cells powered off.",
      "End-to-end 5G NSA setup operational with no connectivity issues."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G CLI interface using `SSH admin@<IP>` and authenticate with appropriate credentials.",
      "Configure the test setup as per test configuration and record parameters.",
      "Start logging to capture call flow and signaling messages.",
      "Power ON the UE to initiate 5G NSA attach procedure.",
      "Wait for successful attach confirmation in logs (attach request and attach complete messages).",
      "Validate Secondary Node Addition by checking SgNB addition request and SgNB reconfiguration complete messages as per 3GPP TS 37.340 Clause 10.2.1.",
      "Verify UE is attached to correct LTE and 5G cells by checking PCI, Global eNB ID/Global gNB, ARFCN/NR-ARFCN as per test configuration.",
      "Power OFF the UE to initiate detach procedure (LTE Detach and Secondary Node Release).",
      "Validate Secondary Node Release procedure by checking UE context release and RRC connection release messages, and SgNB release request/acknowledge messages as per 3GPP TS 37.340 Clause 10.4.1.",
      "Wait for successful detach confirmation in logs (detach request and detach accept messages).",
      "Stop and save logs for analysis.",
      "Repeat steps 4 to 10 for a total of 10 iterations."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "Attach success rate and Secondary Node Addition success rate are 100%, all 10 iterations pass.",
      "Detach success rate and Secondary Node Release success rate are 100%, all 10 iterations pass.",
      "Attach latency measured and recorded as per Table 5-3.",
      "No connectivity issues or failures during attach-detach and secondary node procedures.",
      "UE attached to correct LTE and 5G cells in all iterations."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "Test logs stored for reference.",
      "KPI measurements recorded in test report."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Log analysis of attach, secondary node addition, detach, and secondary node release signaling messages",
      "Verification of UE cell parameters in logs",
      "KPI calculation for attach success rate, detach success rate, secondary node addition/release success rates, and latency"
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "TC_NEG_001",
    "title": "Validate behavior when UE attempts attach with poor radio conditions below minimum coupling loss",
    "category": "NEGATIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "Single cell test setup with single UE placed under poor radio conditions exceeding minimum coupling loss (below LTE RSRP or 5G SS-RSRP thresholds).",
      "All other cells powered off.",
      "End-to-end LTE or 5G NSA setup operational."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G CLI interface using `SSH admin@<IP>` and authenticate with appropriate credentials.",
      "Configure the test setup to apply poor radio conditions to UE (using attenuators or fading generator).",
      "Start logging to capture signaling messages.",
      "Power ON the UE to initiate attach procedure.",
      "Monitor logs for attach failure or timeout indications.",
      "Attempt to power OFF the UE and observe detach behavior.",
      "Stop and save logs."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "Attach requests fail or time out due to poor radio conditions.",
      "Attach success rate is below 100%, with failures logged.",
      "Detach procedure either not initiated or results in error due to failed attach.",
      "Logs show attach failure messages or no attach complete.",
      "System handles failure gracefully without crashes or deadlocks."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "Test logs stored for failure analysis."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Log analysis for failed attach attempts and error messages",
      "Monitoring system stability during attach failure",
      "Verification that detach is not performed or appropriately handled after attach failure"
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "TC_NEG_002",
    "title": "Validate system behavior when UE fails to comply with RRCConnectionReconfiguration during Secondary Node Release",
    "category": "NEGATIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "5G NSA test setup with UE capable of triggering reconfiguration failure.",
      "Secondary Node Release procedure initiated by MN or SN."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G CLI interface using `SSH admin@<IP>` and authenticate.",
      "Start logging signaling messages.",
      "Trigger Secondary Node Release procedure (MN or SN initiated).",
      "Simulate UE unable to comply with RRCConnectionReconfiguration message (e.g., reject or fail reconfiguration).",
      "Observe UE behavior and network reaction to reconfiguration failure.",
      "Stop and save logs."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "UE performs the reconfiguration failure procedure as specified.",
      "Network handles UE reconfiguration failure gracefully.",
      "Secondary Node Release procedure completes or fails with appropriate signaling.",
      "No system crashes or indefinite hangs occur.",
      "Logs capture the failure and subsequent recovery steps."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "Logs stored for analysis of failure handling."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Log analysis for RRCConnectionReconfiguration and failure messages",
      "Verification of signaling flow completion or error handling",
      "UE behavior validation post reconfiguration failure"
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "TC_EDGE_001",
    "title": "Validate attach and detach procedure performance at the boundary of excellent radio conditions",
    "category": "EDGE CASES",
    "preconditions": [
      "Single cell test setup with UE placed at the edge of excellent radio conditions (LTE RSRP or 5G SS-RSRP exactly at threshold defined in Clause 4.6).",
      "All other cells powered off."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G CLI interface using `SSH admin@<IP>` and authenticate.",
      "Configure radio conditions to exact threshold values using attenuators or fading generator.",

      "Wait for attach success or failure indication.",
      "Power OFF the UE to initiate detach.",
      "Repeat attach-detach cycle 10 times.",
      "Stop and save logs."
    ],

      "Attach and detach success rates are close to or at 100%.",
      "Attach latency values remain within acceptable range.",
      "No intermittent failures due to borderline radio conditions.",
